mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock(material_id, warehouse_id, quantity) VALUES(#{materialId}, #{warehouseId}, #{quantity})
mapper.update: UPDATE stock SET quantity=#{quantity} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM stock WHERE material_id=#{materialId} AND warehouse_id=#{warehouseId}
mapper.update: UPDATE stock SET quantity=quantity+#{quantity} WHERE material_id=#{materialId} AND warehouse_id=#{warehouseId}
UPDATE stock SET quantity=quantity-#{quantity} WHERE material_id=#{materialId} AND warehouse_id=#{warehouseId}
mapper.select: SELECT s.* FROM stock s INNER JOIN material m ON s.material_id = m.id WHERE s.quantity < m.min_stock ORDER BY s.material_id
